# matomo_tagmanager_builtin_variable (Data Source)

Matomo's built-in, always-available trigger-condition variables (e.g. PagePath, ClickId), exposed as named attributes so they can be referenced instead of typed as bare strings. This is a discoverability aid only - it is not an exhaustive or validated list of every value condition.variable accepts (third-party plugins can contribute more, and any user-defined matomo_tagmanager_variable* resource is referenceable via a {{Name}} macro regardless of this data source).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `browser_language` (String) Matomo's built-in "BrowserLanguage" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `click_button` (String) Matomo's built-in "ClickButton" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `click_classes` (String) Matomo's built-in "ClickClasses" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `click_destination_url` (String) Matomo's built-in "ClickDestinationUrl" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `click_element` (String) Matomo's built-in "ClickElement" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `click_id` (String) Matomo's built-in "ClickId" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `click_node_name` (String) Matomo's built-in "ClickNodeName" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `click_text` (String) Matomo's built-in "ClickText" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `container_id` (String) Matomo's built-in "ContainerId" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `container_revision` (String) Matomo's built-in "ContainerRevision" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `container_version` (String) Matomo's built-in "ContainerVersion" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `dns_lookup_time` (String) Matomo's built-in "DnsLookupTime" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `environment` (String) Matomo's built-in "Environment" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `error_line` (String) Matomo's built-in "ErrorLine" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `error_message` (String) Matomo's built-in "ErrorMessage" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `error_url` (String) Matomo's built-in "ErrorUrl" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `first_directory` (String) Matomo's built-in "FirstDirectory" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `form_classes` (String) Matomo's built-in "FormClasses" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `form_destination` (String) Matomo's built-in "FormDestination" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `form_element` (String) Matomo's built-in "FormElement" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `form_id` (String) Matomo's built-in "FormId" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `form_name` (String) Matomo's built-in "FormName" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `history_hash_new` (String) Matomo's built-in "HistoryHashNew" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `history_hash_new_path` (String) Matomo's built-in "HistoryHashNewPath" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `history_hash_new_search` (String) Matomo's built-in "HistoryHashNewSearch" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `history_hash_new_url` (String) Matomo's built-in "HistoryHashNewUrl" trigger-condition variable identifier.

- `history_hash_old_url` (String) Matomo's built-in "HistoryHashOldUrl" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `history_source` (String) Matomo's built-in "HistorySource" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `id` (String) Always "builtin" - this data source has no configuration, so its id is a fixed constant.
- `iso_date` (String) Matomo's built-in "IsoDate" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `local_date` (String) Matomo's built-in "LocalDate" trigger-condition variable identifier.
- `local_hour` (String) Matomo's built-in "LocalHour" trigger-condition variable identifier.
